test_names: workflow domain types > grouped phase contracts keep guidance, policy, evidence, and runtime state distinct
workflow template registry service > projects legacy flat phase fields into grouped phase contract sections when listing templates
workflow template registry service > accepts grouped-only phase contracts without requiring duplicate flat authoring fields
workflow template registry service > rejects grouped phase contracts with invalid constraint strengths and skill provenance
workflow template registry service > strips session-owned runtime state while preserving unknown template fields when writing templates
expected_failure_reasons: Legacy flat template phases currently list only flat fields and do not project intent, contract, and evidencePolicy grouped sections.
Grouped-only phase contracts currently fail legacy flat-field validation for name, instructions, completionCriteria, outputArtifact, handoff fields, and transition.
Invalid grouped constraint strengths and plugin provenance currently remain startable because grouped strength/provenance validation is not implemented.
Template writes currently persist session-owned runtimeState instead of stripping it while preserving unknown template fields.

validation_evidence.result: RED accepted for T002: 32 pass, 4 fail, 101 expect() calls, 36 tests across 2 files. Failures are behavior assertions for missing grouped-contract implementation, not syntax/setup/import failures.
failing_tests: projects legacy flat phase fields into grouped phase contract sections when listing templates
accepts grouped-only phase contracts without requiring duplicate flat authoring fields
rejects grouped phase contracts with invalid constraint strengths and skill provenance
strips session-owned runtime state while preserving unknown template fields when writing templates

MP-003.evidence: Added grouped phase contract executable documentation and registry tests that keep intent, contract, evidencePolicy, and session-owned runtimeState distinct; runtimeState is expected to be stripped from template persistence.

MP-004.evidence: Added tests for guidance, policy, evidence, and gate strength distinctions plus rejection of invalid grouped strength assignments.

MP-011.evidence: Added legacy-flat-phase-contract.json and a RED registry test requiring flat fields to project into grouped contract sections before any destructive grouped persistence migration.

CA-007.evidence: Added registry validation tests for grouped phase contracts and skill provenance diagnostics, covering authoring/update/list validation behavior required before import/export/session-start consumers rely on the contract.

recovery_guidance: T004 should implement compatibility projection from legacy flat fields to intent, contract, and evidencePolicy while preserving original/unknown fields.
T004 should normalize grouped-only contracts into the existing startable registry shape without requiring duplicate flat authoring fields.
T004 should reject invalid grouped constraint strengths with WORKFLOW_PHASE_CONSTRAINT_STRENGTH_INVALID and invalid plugin provenance with WORKFLOW_PHASE_SKILL_INVALID_PROVENANCE.
T004 should strip session-owned runtimeState from persisted templates while retaining unknown template, phase, artifact, criteria, and transition fields.
